qr.title: Scan with the Mi Home app
qr.description:
![QR]({qr_image})

Open the Mi Home app, tap the QR scanner (top-right corner), and scan the code. The dialog will advance automatically once you confirm on the phone.

qr_failed.title: QR not scanned in time
qr_failed.description: The QR code expired before you scanned it. Submit to generate a new one.

discover.title: Pick your vacuum
discover.description: More than one vacuum was found in your account. Choose the one to add.

progress.waiting_for_scan:
![QR]({qr_image})

Open the Mi Home app, tap the QR scanner (top-right corner), and scan the code. The dialog will advance automatically once you confirm on the phone.

error.qr_not_scanned: QR was not scanned in time. A new code is shown — try again.

abort.no_vacuum_found: No vacuum was found in this Xiaomi account. Make sure it's paired in the Mi Home app and try again.
abort.cloud_list_failed: Could not list devices in your Xiaomi account. Try again later.
abort.no_local_ip: Xiaomi cloud did not return a local IP for this vacuum. Make sure it's online and connected to the same Wi-Fi as Home Assistant.
abort.local_unreachable: The vacuum was found in the cloud but Home Assistant cannot reach it on the LAN. Check it's on the same network and online.
abort.local_probe_failed: Local probe failed unexpectedly. See logs.
